title: Fresh Spears
description: Added an extra touch to the spears that I personally found enjoyable to play with and experience. My first ever pack also. (:
body: When the new spears released I felt like something was off. I decided to upload a pack where I tweaked some things on the spear. I hope you guys enjoy. (My first Pack)![Fresh Spears](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/595aa448b8a3d1b9178d7cb25aaa2681f9784f3d.png)
